info.title: beaconcha.in API
info.description: The beaconcha.in API provides comprehensive Ethereum blockchain data including consensus layer slots, epochs, validators, rewards, sync committees, execution layer blocks, addresses, gas prices, Rocket Pool data, and ETH.Store metrics. Free tier: 10 req/min/IP. All responses cached 1 min.

parameters.name: epoch
parameters.description: Epoch number, 'latest', or 'finalized'
